pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and access newer framework features.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 17, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: List.get(0) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException if the list is empty, whereas List.getFirst() throws NoSuchElementException, which is the preferred semantic for accessing the first element in modern Java collections.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for accessing the first element.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it triggers deprecation warnings and will cause compilation errors in future JDK versions.
